name: manufacturing-dashboard
description: Full-stack manufacturing analytics dashboard with real-time KPI tracking, CSV/Excel data import, and interactive Chart.js visualizations. Express backend with React frontend.

features.name: KPI Dashboard
features.description: Real-time manufacturing metrics with interactive Chart.js visualizations

features.name: Data Import
features.description: Upload CSV and Excel files for bulk data ingestion

features.name: Production Tracking
features.description: Monitor production lines, throughput, and efficiency

features.name: Quality Metrics
features.description: Track defect rates, yield, and quality trends

features.name: RESTful API
features.description: Express-based API with validation and error handling

features.name: Mock Data Generation
features.description: Script to generate realistic test data for development

projectStructure:
manufacturing-dashboard/
├── frontend/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/    # React components
│   │   ├── pages/         # Page components
│   │   └── utils/         # Helper functions
│   └── public/            # Static assets
├── backend/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── routes/        # Express route handlers
│   │   ├── models/        # Database models
│   │   └── middleware/    # Express middleware
│   ├── migrations/        # Knex migrations
│   └── seeds/             # Seed data
└── scripts/               # Data generation scripts
deployment:
**Frontend**: Can be deployed to any static host (Netlify, Vercel, S3).
**Backend**: Deploy to any Node.js host (Railway, Render, EC2).

For local development:
```bash
# Terminal 1: Backend
cd backend && npm run dev

# Terminal 2: Frontend
cd frontend && npm start
```
